name: codex-autoresearch
description: Codex plugin for autonomous benchmark and optimization loops.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/autoresearch.mjs && node --check scripts/finalize-autoresearch.mjs && node --check scripts/perfection-benchmark.mjs && node scripts/perfection-benchmark.mjs --fail-on-gap && node scripts/autoresearch.mjs --help && node scripts/finalize-autoresearch.mjs --help && npm test
